reviews.review_description: This game is extraordinary, i mean it! But the fact that you have to have an internet connection, is just dumb. Can you please make it available without internet? Minecraft doesn’t have this problem, its sorta like minecraft but more realistic. It would mean a lot to me, and probably a lot more people too.

If I had 10 keys for any vr game ever, I think I would pick this game every time, this game seems all fun and innocent, but you get attached and after you beat the game, you cry (what I did). The speech at the end is just a masterpiece, game has a TON of features, multiplayer, and game modes.. the most unexpected thing I found about this game.. is insulation and aurora borealis..game might good on the graphics side.. but the gameplay makes up for it even more.. I have ONE HUGGEEEE problem tho.. you play the game, and you can’t stop, you play so much that you play at 1 pm and take your headset off at 9 pm. Absolute masterpiece

I love playing this game with my friends, but lately the game stoped working every time I try going into the game I get the loading screen but after that it’s just a black screen and ive try everything to fix it, I’ve restarted my vr, I’ve uninstalled the game and reinstalled, I’ve left my vr on for hours in the game and still didn’t work.
But I still love the game and would recommend it to everyone.

This is quite literally the best survival game ever￼￼ I love playing it with my friends and it never get boring I do have a suggestion, the devs should add different maps like a jungle map you can survive in or a desert map there’s so many more things you can add in this game that ￼￼would make it better but one step at a time but i’d really appreciate it if you could add my suggestion￼ and I’m sure everyone else would too.￼

It’s a good game but pls add these animal.A chinchilla it would have to take dust baths that would be in your notebook and daily feed also water. Snowy owls roam out in the night ,and are tamable ,build bird cages and have them as pets after feeding them meat.

Its a good game by yourself but you what well make it better 🤔 ONLINE MULTIPLAYER so if you don't have freinds😢😭😥😔 you can play with other people who also don't have friends😀😆🙂😃😄😁 so can you please 🙏🙏🙏 add ONLINE MULTIPLAYER, thank you for your time.
i really like this game but i wish i had some one to play with. so if you feel the same you can add me

Absolutely amazing game this, I played this with my brother and we were pretty much hooked from the start. Proper survival game, played 60 plus hours, so much fun but at the same time there is a great level of trickyness. Easily one of my favourite games of all time and I don’t say that lightly.

Pretty special this game and thank you to the devs if you read this, a truly incredible game that stays with you.

reviews.review_title: Devs please add this and please read thi
reviews.review_description: I love this game but I have no one to play with so I really want them to add public servers instead of having a code that would be a lot of fun because then you could play with people that you don't know and you could do more journeys

this would be a 5 star if anything i would give 10 stars out of 5 but i need the devs to see this, so i would like to say how absolutely perfect this game is, think of green hell, but more forgiving and more cold anyway, i personally love the game and it is a gem in my library but it needs more i have some ideas like after a snowstorm snow is on the roof of buildings and it slowly disappears over time, also something simple, snowballs, if the player grabs snow for a few seconds a snowball is given, another thing is spears i think spear fishing and having a weapon with reach would be perfect and useful think of the sharp stick but longer and better, and for the bow maybe have extra arrows like one for the materials i have so meany ideas, since this game genuinely has potential i feel it can become so much better then it already is the rest of my ideas are adding birds that give a new type of meat, cooking stews, having water freeze over so you have to break the ice to get to the water, more interactive snow so when you walk it leaves a trail, i get you developers probably have other things to do but i really hope you see this and btw i want you to know that your game is amazing and i also plan to join the doscord if you do end up seeing thid just know you make some quality stuff

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for great ideas, feel free to join our Discord where players talk about game, suggests new ideas, talk about game.
https://discord.gg/wenklystudio

Currently we have planned 2 updates that are in works, but players feedback is always appreciated! Great to hear you love the game <3

reviews.review_description:
When I first started playing I just kept dying, but after visiting the discord and getting a few hints, I got the hang of it. You can not only learn to survive, but you can live quite comfortably! Build houses, hunt, mine and craft all sorts of creature comforts. 

One of the things they score big on is the ability to use one save file whether you’re playing solo or co-op. I hope they keep expanding the game, adding more building pieces, decor and adding cooking. I’d love to make pie with those huckleberries. 😉

This game is super duper good and the base building is immaculate. Every task you do feels weighty and it takes time to do. This is a great survival game. The only issue I have is even though I’m on quest 3s the framerate isn’t all that high but I mean it’s still playable for sure. Finally there are also a few bugs and such that just need worked out. Otherwise I love this game.

Game doesn't even load anymore,  just a black screen.  Devs are horrible because they aren't doing anything to fix it and people have BEEN having the same issue for MONTHS. Don't buy if you want to have 2 seconds of fun and then stare at a black screen. (Btw half of the 1 star reviews just say "the game is bad" not a good review)
The crafting and survival is fun but most of the water i hold to my face just falls out of my hand without drinking. So usually I'm dying from thirst. 5 stars if that was fixed

I love this game and have some ideas for it <3
1: sandbox mode (you can build and spawn things and entitys pls make sure it’s multiplayer)
2: Fix the axe crafting recipe cuz it real bugged 
3: add more creatures like birds and monsters like the sanity creatures 
Thx for reading plz reply thx!!! <3
its amazing to see the new sky thing(couldnt remember the name) after finishing your new shelter and wearing your new wolf skin set

Highly recommend this game! Really enjoyed this game in all modes! I just repaired the boat on the morning of day 10 in hard-core. Never saw the Watchers (i was careful cause they scare me. Lol) almost lost my run to a fox because I thought it was fake. Haha. Hey Devs, what's the record time to repair the boat? I wanna know how close I got. Thanks!

Developers, this game is incredible. It provides satisfying yet challenging gameplay that leaves me wanting more at the end of each session. One issue I do have, and the reason I do not give this game 5 stars, is the bugs I encounter. Notable examples include the game's tendency to crash (or whatever the Error:Default screen means- if you notice this, devs, please look into it or tell me how to fix it) about half the times I load in, items in my hands disappearing whenever I turn my headset off, never to be seen again, (I've lost a great many tools this way) and the occasional but lovable bits of jank like my door coming off its hinges or the pig I was skinning becoming stuck to the ceiling, as well as my knife disappering an my arm becoming locked in position. 
All in all, this is a great game, and I recommend buying it (especially for its relatively low price), but there are some issues to expect I hope the devs will fix.

reviews.review_title: Hours of fun but frustrating at times
reviews.review_description: Game is challenging & hard to put down. Have spent hours in it trying to figure out best solutions to reach objective. At first I was so set on getting to the end goal that it was too frustrating when my stuff disappeared. Now that I started to just enjoy my surroundings & the journey instead, it has become one of my favorite games. I have spent hours in this world  & haven't even done some of the crafting or even made it everywhere on the map yet. I took off one star because game mechanics are very finicky, but it's well worth the money to buy this.

One of the best games I have ever played on VR, I like all the hallucinations, I think it would be cool if you added a hallucination to where you think you see your house if you’re too cold but when you get close, it’s actually not your house￼! and, it would be cool if the animals can get rabies, which makes them attack, dealing more damage, and the rabbits do the same damage as a boar￼

Here are some update ideas elevator a crane a four wheeler a fishing boat a trailer and a flashlight and a game mode that can be creative and a drone to look at your home in the air.please please please do this I have 80hd.

reviews.review_title: We need a update on zv frost
reviews.review_description:
Its is a five star game,and  i love it ,but It has a lot of glitches pls fix them
 Like  missing stuff  items like furs, you work so hard to get  and why I can't  I catch a darn fish .

I want to live in this game. I’ve been so obsessed with this game lately. I can’t stop thinking about all the new things I can discover and all the ways I can progress. This game is very unique in a way that at first you are STUCK on the island but as you fix the boat and build up your base it feels like you’re leaving a home, as if a little part of you stays with the island. 

  That being said, playing in solo mode can get a little lonely even with Shadow Man giving you company every once in a while. I think pets would be a great addition to the game. Being able to befriend foxes and wolves would be so cool. You feed them a piece of meat and you earn their trust, the more trust you earn from them the more they’ll do for you. Such as help you hunt whether that’s killing a hare or retrieving an animal you’ve just killed and maybe they’ll even fight for you. Aside from that, these pets would give you a small boost of sanity plus who doesn’t love pets. There could be utility’s the pets could have as well, like being able to carry water skins or you could attach a sled to pull logs and resources.

One thing I wish was better is the building. Sometimes my structures won’t place the way I want it to no matter how I rotate it and sometimes it won’t even let me place it at all even when the land is flat. It’s not unbearable but it is pretty annoying for people who like to build such as myself.

Other than that, great game. I love everything about it!

There is one problem I have tho it’s that the game doesn’t get updates a ton like we got two update in the past 7 months and a cool idea was what if they add pets like you can take wolf that helps you hunt and you can love in your house and play with but other than that awesome game
This is one of the most replayable games I've found in a while, the level of complexity makes it fun but challenging, definitely worth a play!!

reviews.review_title: So much fun to play, just a few things..
reviews.review_description:
If you enjoy VR survival - crafting games such as Medieval Dynasty or Green Hell, i think you will find this enjoyable as well… but it’s not without a few “glitches” once in a while. Deal breaker? For me, Not really, just makes the gameplay slightly disappointing from time to time. There have been updates made to the game over the last few months that have helped. (Making crossbows, beds to sleep at night etc) I just wish there were actual ”save points” in the game - just like those previous games I mentioned where, if in the event that you get killed, you can return to a previous save point and not just retuned to a base flag, with no items but an empty backpack and belly to boot. There are work arounds - but still… The Good points: it’s a beautiful map, sort of reminds me of an extended Medieval Dynasty’s northern region or Song in the Smoke’s last region or two (minus the snow monster!) lots of things you can learn to craft as you go, no rush to complete any timeline you can play at your own pace! I like that! There is an overarching storyline to complete in the game as well.
So, if you’re not daunted by a few weird glitches in game mechanics (like my right hand disappearing for no reason occasionally and I have to quit and ￼restart to get back to normal) and enjoy playing at your own pace (don’t be in a hurry to get though the game,because you will die otherwise - and often.) then jump in a give it a go - I think you’ll find it pretty enjoyable overall.

I have played this solo and with friends and it’s super fun the survival experience is great and the customization options make it accessible to a lot of players the only thing I would change is character customization skin tones and hair and the ability to dye clothes different colors would be great for multiplayer so we are not all the same bald dude but other than that game is great can easily play for hours and is a lot of fun in multiplayer would definitely recommend.

This game was very fun besides the very brutal molestation from the moose and bears overall 10/10 games highly recommend this won’t be a waste of money like cough cough 
Ghosts of tabor

reviews.review_title: Great but after purchase of backpack…
reviews.review_description: Amazing game, loved it from the start and it’s a great way to pass time especially with the throwing physics and my and my brother started throwing rocks and playing catch haha. An issue though, I purchased the bag and I didn’t notice any extra storage, just some designs on the bag. The main reason of my purchase was to have extra spaces but did not get any extra space. Is there something I’m suppose to do? Please help with this other wize I feel it is a useless purchase. I’ll fix my rating once this is resolved. Thanks

This review would be 5 stars, with a few improvements. I know this game is still in its beginning stages, which is why I look forward to it becoming better than it is. 

1) All of the time, I try to take something out of my bag and it highlights green, only to grab something from the outside of my bag. Then I try to put that item back on the outside of my bag, it won't let me. This happens all the time to both myself and my husband. 

2) Just about anytime I try to pick something up off the ground, such as a log, it grabs something out of my belt instead. This is very frustrating. I've adjusted my belt settings but that makes no difference. 

3) An upgradable backpack would be amazing. 

4) The ability to rearrange items would be wonderful. Sometimes I'd like to move furniture I've built. It would be nice to be able to move it without having to destroy it and rebuild, wasting supplies and time  

Otherwise this game is a lot of fun. I find myself playing for hours without even realizing it. I would love to give this game 5 stars and hopefully will be able to in the future.

Amazing game, gifted to my friend and other friend bought it, we have atleast 20 hrs already and its a great game, base building and resource gathering feels amazing, I would like more decorations and a backpack upgrade in the future. Great game tho 10/10

The game is pretty fun i beat it with a friend although there is alot of jank that can ruin the experience at times and some other annoying things like not being able to upgrade the backpack or not being able to destroy tree trunks overall it's pretty fun just be prepared to commonly experience bugs

Unless you eat like what feels like every 2 minutes! I want to like this game. I won't give up on it quite yet. Its still early for me in the game but the eating is waaaaay to often. And drinking water is also a bit toooo much. Who needs to drink and eat that much. I can understand adding some stress into the game but can you plz make it so that's not all you think about. Like I mentioned I just have a few hours into the game and I hope it gets better.

developer_response.body:
Hey, sorry to hear that!
While creating a game, please choose CUSTOM mode where you can adjust many parameters like hunger/thirst depleting speed or even turn it off.

We hope you will enjoy the game on your own rules

reviews.review_description: Why do we need to have a code to join Somone can you make were it automatically

i love the game and everything it is amazing i love absolutely everything about it but maybe you can try to add another island like when you fix the boat you actually go somewhere else because of i know you're both crashed again or something something magically happened and now you are back add a different island and you can go back and forth maybe maybe not i don't know but maybe adding another island would make it cooler you keep all your progress that you got from the other island you gotta get stuff from the other island then it's really neat there's new stuff maybe you find something cool that can help you to escape but i feel like you should add another island or maybe something big.

I love the game especially for its realism and logic exercising features. Only thing that could sell it home is a shovel tools, new materials, new ores, and pickaxes and better shapes for building or filling in the house. Or if not that possibly the ability to edit the pieces. Other than that its a great game! (Edit: my bad the bed and shovel and pickaxe exists you just need more materials) but the ores and new materials thing for sure other than that its a great game.

I am a huge fan of survival games & Frost VR did not disappoint me. I spent a lot of hours in the Frost world. Unfortunately, I dont have anyone to play cooperative mode with, so ive only played solo. It took me awhile to figure out some basic things, but I actually like when things are challenging and makes me think & strategize. I rated the game 5 stars and I meant it, although I  do think that there is plenty of opportunity for growth as well. I played the game through twice & I would gladly return if more levels/worlds/meaningful content were added. Thank you to the developers for creating a satisfying experience.

I originally was having all sorts of issues with the item placement. Apparently my quest headset was having a moment. In the last time since I reviewed I have beat the game and built nearly everything. Occasionally my character's arms will get locked up and need to restart the game to make things run smoothly. Other than a few developer choices on how to gather things that I raise an eyebrow to, it is a good experience!

reviews.review_title: needs more updates like this one
reviews.review_description: This is a great game that is highly recommend for anybody wanting a younger version of the other, more mature survival games. With that being said there are many updates that I want to see and it was unfortunate we had to wait so long for this one. I used to play this game so much but got bored because of the lack of amount of fun in the game so this new update helps with that. I know this game litterly is frost survival but seasons changing would be awesome. I know there’s different levels but for beginners who want to stay on level one and to and not really reach the top but really just build a cool house and chill. The one problem is it gets boring and I wish they had things like changing seasons and new animals and new plants as seasons change. I also wish that they had more things to build and more building features because I want to build houses that are different. More fish would also be cool. I know this is a lot but I really do think this game has potential and that I ls why I want it to add updates as frequently as possible.thats also why I spent the time to write this review.

I love this game and I would play it again over and over! My favorite part was EXTERMINATING mass amounts of moose. Another good thing was touching my friends inappropriately in the co-op. Definitely worth the money, better extraction shooter than ghosts of tabor.

This is one of the best survival games i have played. And I have played a lot of the. Everything from the Forrest to the infected . And this one has a great atmosphere.  I would only suggest that the devs make the doors better and so you can lock them for a more safe feel inside your cabin. And also make the sticks a bit more sturdy looking.
All in all though I have really been loving this. Im not even trying to hurry through it. I enjoy just hanging out in my cabin and going out to fish and hunt and farm supplies.  I love it.

I've said it before I'll say it a million times more, if your inventory system is even a little bit hard to use in VR it isn't immersive.  Constantly grabbing the wrong things, difficulty putting tools back in the side slots etc etc   The book works well enough at least.

It's still a good enough experience but it still feels once again like an Early Access game.
A lot of times when i drop something up in the north mountains, my stuff will just go through the floor like its not there.
Fun in multiplayer and great game

At first I was just walking around making my house, gathering materials... Then at night I walked into my house, and as I started to close the door, I got jump scared by a pair of skinny black legs run right in front of the door 😬
It so peaceful at first, till you start loosing sanity, then it becomes a horror game...
I love the game I do think it should have a log sled would make it easier to build
So fun it's like strayed but no people to kill u and ur able to play with friends peacefully

Frost survival is such a good game I've come across so far! , it never gets boring played for like 4 or 5 hours straight. Been building my cabin, hunting, and cooking food. Really recommend if you get bored of other survival vr games! And not to mention I haven't came across a SINGLE bug. 5/5.

starting off this game has been a great experience. i really love the survivor aspects that i put into place especially with the building mechanics and the frost mechanics. i love the way you can hunt for animal in certain areas have certain resources and you have to kind of adapt to it i think it would be really cooler if they added more details to little things like fall damage. but overall it's a great experience to have fun with friends and gives you that survival urge you've been looking for!

The game is amazing and great but it has many glitches like when we tried to build clothes and the clothes and the clothes stayed there and didn’t give us the clothes it just floated on the workbench and when we broke it, it was still floating so this is definitely something the devs should look at but past this the game is huge we are still discovering.
The game was fun for a bit about 3 days but after the game gets dull and hard but if u keep pushing it will get better and DEVS PLEASE ADD MUTIPLAYER LOBBS SO U DONT HAVE TO GO FIND PPL ON DISCORD!!

It is a very good game has great realism and mechanics but the doors are very glitchy. Also it would be nice if there was a grassland world so developers if you so this please fix the doors.

￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for bringing the doors issue to our attention, AppleJack2012. We really appreciate your feedback and review!

reviews.review_description: Great game but please update the game already, it rarely gets updates now

I’ve only done single player but this is a fun game with the right amount of grind and reward. The progression is good and there is the possibility to play on after completing the story. There’s many hours of engaging play so it’s good value.
This game actually sucks like yeah
I love survival games and I do it in real life graphics are similar to a cartoon would recommend

reviews.review_title: Solid game, a bit monotonous sometimes
reviews.review_description: Alot of walking from one side of the map to the other but the survival aspect is fun and the game itself was super immersive. Way more fun to play with friends but still enjoyable as a solo
It’s one of the best survival games ever

reviews.review_title: The Most Fun Survival Game on VR Coop
reviews.review_description:
Wife and I have been addicted to this game since buying it, on day 20 in-game and have only explored half the map lol. Definitely good for the long grind. Hoping a new patch/update is in the works soon for Quest 3.

Couple quality of life suggestions for Devs:

- Better grabbing mechanics/hit boxes; can be difficult at times to put things in or take items out of your back pack (often grabs tools on outside of backpack instead of items)

- Putting away tools on outside of backpack doesnt register half the time and you have to find the “sweet spot” to get it to go in inventory

- Stabbing animals when in combat or carving animal skins after killing them is hit or miss with registering. 

- Better carrying physics; carrying long logs or animal carcass is wonkey with how they sway back and forth and can make carrying longer distances difficult if not harvesting right away

- Please please please in future update add options to expand back pack capacity!! Would make gathering stock so much easier if you could upgrade carrying slots/tool slots

These are all just suggestions, for the $ the game is better than most early access games ive played and is very well put together for what it is. Def worth the price, would say its even a bargain and def lots of replay value. 5 Stars

Graphic is not so great. Probably because of big map, neccesary for the game. The game itself remiders Dinasty, only here we have no summer. Sadly, I can`t find possiblity to skip the night, I need to sit and wait for the daylight. Probably it is OK for multiplayer, if gamers like to plan and speak. For single player it is lonely. I am done with my planing at the first hour of the night. Second thing, what makes me angry, the temperatur of me is dropping to soon. You are not dead, if you are walking by -15C about an hour. If you are sitting and not moving, then probably yes. First time I died by taking some berries, about 20m away from the fire. Probably devs can make this frost thing more realistic. And give us the option just sleep and skip the night. Then I would give the game 5 stars.
Thanks for the Ansver, Devs. I already buit the bed. At 4 AM is to early to sleep. And it is wery cold so early, with all my clothing I can`t go far from the fire.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for feedback!

You can build bed to skip the night, but you need to obtain Flint and craft Rope. Flint is in second area (west).
Also soon we will release an Custom Mode Update, where you can adjust values of how fast temperature depletes etc.

I hope you will enjoy our game even more.
Best regards, Paul.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, Dougydoug513. The machete suggestion sounds reasonable - thank you for sharing it!

reviews.review_description: the game is really good apart for some glitches and has a lot of mysteries like paintings and areas. the lore is really good to.

This game has the perfect blend of adventure, mystery, spooky, survival, and “shooter” themes. 

I previously played Green Hell VR, and in comparison, I like this game much better. In Green Hell you had to track his proteins, fats, AND carbs, couldn’t sprint for long periods of time without getting too tired, were forced to sleep after a period of time, and were sometimes attacked by deadly animals/bugs with little warning. I found Frost Survival VR to have a lot less of those pressures. On easy mode you only have to watch out for his hunger (no specific macros) and water, he didn’t even really need to sleep if you didn’t want him to. You can sprint across the whole map without him tiring out, and any dangerous animals make themselves known by their sounds to give you time to prepare. One thing to look out for is his sanity, which lowers when distant from light sources. Having low sanity brings a mystical element as you start to hallucinate. It can be genuinely creepy having shadow figures follow and sometimes sprint after you. You’ll also start to hear noises of animals that aren’t really there. 

The BEST part about this game though is getting to build your own camp and customise it however you want. You can build a log cabin however big or however small. you have to find the resources to build it of course, but those resources are plentiful and regenerate quickly.

I played this game with my spouse for a week straight and we just finished it. Next week we plan to get our friends across the country to join in with us. I can’t wait for that. 

Overall, I HIGHLY recommend this game to everyone and HOPE the come out with new versions in the future.


Recommendations for the developers (*some are agreeing with other reviews*): 

-Make it easier to pull out items from the backpack. I probably accidentally grabbed an item mounted to the side 100 times.

-Once a new material is found, display what new items have been unlocked and can now be made with those materials.

-Use words for clay, resin, and dirt as all of the sketches look the same.

-Please make the hare traps easier to open. Please Please Please. 🙏🏼 

-Allow two ice picks to take up one side slot instead of two. 

-Would like to see a timer until snowstorm feature as I’d forget the times or it felt like the snow storm came way later than it originally said. 

-A separate container for sticks as they are one of the most needed materials yet fill up the backpack very quickly. 

-Please make the reinforced shovel less unwieldy. 

-Once a structure has been built (like a stick, flint basket, or shelf), instead of having to destroy it and rebuild to move it, allow for it to simply be moved to a new area. 

-Would like the chance to somehow save the man at the end. Wasn’t sure if there were actually bandages somewhere or if it was just part of the script. 

-Explain how to grab an arrow from the quiver by pressing the trigger button (was very confused for a long time) 

-Love all the decor options, please keep them coming. The more personable the better.

reviews.review_title: Best game but add multiplayer lobbys
reviews.review_description: What i mean by multiplayer lobbys is were you can see other server of  other people playing but its still fun to play with friends

I am being very honest about what I'm going to say right now. This hast to be the best survival game yet. The one thing I dislike is that the game doesn't get many updates. Like, I would LOVEEEEEE a taming update. That would be so fun. Like you could use berries to tame deer, hogs, moose, and  hare. And meat for wolves, bears, leperds, and foxes. 9/10 game -1 point because of the game having not many updates. And add public servers. Because some people don't have friends that own frost survival, so to solve that problem, public servers!
I feel like fishing should get a complete update. Different waters, different fish, spear fishing, ice fishing, and more overall fish. Still 5 stars tho :)
I would like it if you kill a wolf or Something else it would give you meat

developer_response.body:
Hey, it gives skin and meat but you need to use knife to skin it

If you have more questions or suggestions join our discord https://discord.gg/wenklystudio

reviews.review_description: The game is good and all with lots of ways to survive and build but I don’t recommend playing solo UNLESS you are very good at survival games, and also it's kinda funny because one friend would be insane and he's like “Oh my god I see a black demon staring at me” and yelling, also again solo I recommend ONLY for very very very good survival people
This game is genuinely SOOO much fun with your friends and it is cerry good to make videos on
